Virtual Farming / Managed Livestock Farming  
Virtual Farming  is a technology -enabled agriculture participation model that allows 
urban individuals to own and participate in real farming assets remotely , without 
physically managing farms.  
In the Uzhavar Sandhai Virtual Farming Model , individuals can purchase a specific 
livestock animal (goat)  and the company manages the entire farming p

oat)  and the company manages the entire farming process.

• Urban asset owners

• Technology -enabled farm management

• Blockchain -linked farm records

• Transparent asset tracking

assets managed by professional farmers using AI -driven farm management

while allowing participants to engage in real agriculture without managing farms 
directly.

SECTION 1 — BASIC CONCEPT QUESTIONS  
Q1 
 
What is Virtual Farming?  
 
Answer   
Virtual Farming is a model that allows individuals to own real agricultural assets without 
physically managing a farm. In the system operated by Uzhavar Sandhai Pvt Ltd, 
participants purchase livestock assets while the company manages

urchase livestock assets while the company manages the entire farming 
process including feeding, veterinary care, and monitoring.  
 
Q2 
 
What is Managed Livestock Farming?  
 
Answer  
 
Managed Livestock Farming is a farming model where livestock ownership and farm 
operations are separated. Asset owners purchase animals while professional farmers 
and farm management teams handle the rearing

mers 
and farm management teams handle the rearing process using scientific farming 
methods.  
 
Q3 
 
What problem does Virtual Farming solve?  
 
Answer  
 
Virtual farming solves two major problems:  
 
Urban people want exposure to agriculture but lack land and expertise.  
 
Farmers need capital, technology, and market access.  
 
This model connects urban asset owners with rural farmers thr

connects urban asset owners with rural farmers through technology.   
Q4 
 
Is this real farming or a digital simulation?  
 
Answer  
 
This is real farming. Each participant owns a real livestock animal that is physically 
raised on farms. The digital platform only helps track and manage the livestock.  
 
Q5 
 
What animals are currently offered?  
 
Answer

?  
 
Answer  
 
The current model focuses on goat farming because goats have strong market demand, 
relatively low mortality risk, and a shorter farming cycle.
